hotels.name: Riverside Boutique Hotel
hotels.description: A stylish boutique hotel on the riverfront offering modern rooms and a rooftop bar with scenic city views.

hotels.name: Sunset Bay Resort
hotels.description: A beachfront resort featuring spacious suites, multiple pools, and direct access to golden sands and evening sunsets.

hotels.name: Metro Business Hotel
hotels.description: Conveniently located in the business district, with fast Wi-Fi, a business center, and flexible meeting rooms.

hotels.name: Pinecrest Mountain Lodge
hotels.description: Cozy lodge near hiking trails and ski slopes, offering warm common areas and rustic wood-accented rooms.

hotels.name: Clearpoint Airport Hotel
hotels.description: Modern airport hotel with 24-hour shuttle service, soundproof rooms, and quick access to terminals.

hotels.name: Greenway Budget Inn
hotels.description: Economical option in a friendly neighborhood, offering clean rooms and easy access to public transport.
